title: sayeria pleurodes
side_effects: Sayeria pleurodes can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and gastrointestinal issues. Some individuals may experience dizziness, nausea, or vomiting after ingesting the plant, while others may develop an allergic contact dermatitis. In severe cases, improper use of Sayeria pleurodes can lead to anaphylaxis, a life-threatening allergic reaction. It is essential to consult with a medical professional before using the plant for medicinal purposes to minimize the risk of side effects.
